api.title: API Management
api.usage.tip.main: Core call for each turn's narrative generation, consuming the most tokens — assign your strongest model
api.usage.tip.cot: Independent reasoning step before the main turn, improving plot consistency and check quality — requires extra API call
api.usage.tip.bodyPolish: Independent AI polishes narrative text after the main turn generation, consuming extra tokens
api.usage.tip.text_optimization: Post-process generated text for grammar and style — can assign a cheaper model
api.usage.tip.memory_summary: Compress short/mid-term memory into long-term memory summaries, triggered periodically
api.usage.tip.world_generation: Generate world background settings at start, called only once during character creation
api.usage.tip.event_generation: Generate random world events (festivals, disasters, caravans, etc.) to enrich world dynamics
api.usage.tip.world_heartbeat: Periodically update world state (weather, factions, prices, etc.) to simulate a living world
api.usage.tip.npc_chat: 1:1 NPC conversation independent of the main turn, initiated from the relationship panel
api.usage.tip.location_npc_generation: Automatically generate local NPCs when the player arrives at a new location
api.usage.tip.plot_decompose: Use AI to decompose player-written plot outlines into trackable node chains
api.usage.tip.instruction_generation: Generate structured instructions and action options, usually executed with the main turn
api.usage.tip.privacy_repair: Automatically repair non-compliant intimate field descriptions in NSFW mode, configurable retry count
api.usage.tip.field_repair: Automatically complete AI-missing required fields (attributes, equipment, etc.), reducing data gaps
api.usage.tip.imageGen_novelai: Assign API configuration for the NovelAI image backend
api.usage.tip.imageGen_openai: Assign API configuration for the OpenAI DALL-E image backend
api.usage.tip.imageGen_sd_webui: Assign API configuration for the Stable Diffusion WebUI image backend
api.usage.tip.imageGen_comfyui: Assign API configuration for the ComfyUI image backend
api.usage.tip.imageGen_civitai: Assign API configuration for the Civitai image backend. Requires Buzz balance.
api.usage.tip.imageGeneration: Fallback configuration when the corresponding backend has no dedicated assignment
api.usage.tip.imageCharacterTokenizer: Use LLM to extract narrative descriptions from character images for subsequent prompt reference
api.usage.tip.imageSceneTokenizer: Use LLM to extract environment descriptions from scene images to enhance narrative immersion
api.usage.tip.imageSecretTokenizer: Use LLM to extract descriptions from NSFW images (only in NSFW mode)
api.usage.tip.embedding: Convert text to vectors for semantic search — requires an Embedding category API
api.usage.tip.rerank: Re-rank retrieved results to improve relevance — requires Rerank category API or LLM fallback
api.usage.tip.assistant: In-game AI assistant chat panel, answering player questions about the game world
api.usage.tip.world_builder: Batch world building (regions, NPCs, items) for game card authoring
api.usage.tip.engram_batch_solidify: One-click batch solidify: scan world data and fill missing knowledge edges and descriptions for NPCs/locations
api.category.image.hint: Assign and toggle API configs for each image backend. The Image Workshop only shows enabled backends. Tokenizers use LLM category APIs.
api.category.rag.hint: Dropdowns only show category-matching APIs. If there are no options, first add an Embedding or Rerank category API configuration.
api.apiCategory.llm.desc: Dialogue / Instruction generation / Narrative (main turn, etc.)
api.apiCategory.embedding.desc: Embedding — convert text to vectors for Engram retrieval
api.apiCategory.rerank.desc: Reranking — native endpoint for Cohere / SiliconFlow / Jina formats
api.apiCategory.image.desc: Image Generation — NovelAI / DALL-E / SD-WebUI / ComfyUI / Civitai image APIs
api.imageBackend.hint.civitai: AIR identifier from civitai.com model page
api.form.name: Name
api.form.urlHintEmbedding: Enter base URL only, without /v1/... — the system will append automatically
api.form.modelsAvailable: Fetched {count} models, select from the input field
api.form.customRoutingHint: Override the default path. Only needed when your provider uses a non-standard path.
api.form.disablePrefillHint: Some reverse proxies don't support messages ending with assistant role (prefill). When enabled, prefill content is converted to a user instruction instead.
api.test.preflight: Please fill in URL, Key, and Model first
api.fetchModels.preflight: Please fill in API URL and Key first
api.aiSettings.title: AI Generation Settings
api.aiSettings.streaming.label: Streaming Output
api.aiSettings.streaming.desc: Display AI-generated narrative progressively (main round narrative + body polish only; structured data is always non-streaming)
api.aiSettings.splitGen.label: Split Generation
api.aiSettings.splitGen.desc: Main turn split into two API calls: Step 1 generates narrative text, Step 2 generates instructions and action options, improving stability
api.aiSettings.maxRetries.label: Failure Retry Count
api.aiSettings.maxRetries.desc: Maximum retry count after request failure (0-5)
api.aiSettings.privacyRepairRetries.desc: Auto-repair call count when extended fields (NPC intimate info / player avatar) are missing (0-3). The first call is always made; this value controls additional retries on failure/incompleteness. Recommend keeping at 1 to avoid infinite loops from stubborn AI.
api.assign.title: Feature Assignment
api.assign.showAllHintOn: Enabled: dropdowns show all APIs, allowing forced cross-category assignment
api.assign.showAllHintOff: Default: filter by task category to prevent misassignment
api.preset.staleWarning: {count} assignment(s) reference deleted APIs — reset to default, please reassign highlighted items
api.preset.staleHint: Referenced API no longer exists, please reassign
